headline: FedEx pilots approve new contract, ending protracted bargaining
summary: FedEx pilots have finally approved a collective bargaining agreement after years of labor unrest. The post FedEx pilots approve new contract, ending protracted bargaining appeared first on FreightWaves.

summary: FDX's consistent efforts to reward its shareholders through dividend hikes highlight its financial bliss.
